_comment: Maps stone-guard base ProductCode -> vehicle category for the D-Flector 'Category Breakdown' bar chart. Match is on the base code (letters+digits, e.g. DSG045 matches DSG045-A-DF-BOX). ONLY stone guards belong here. Anything not listed (covers/CVR, bungees/BGE, U-bolts/UBT, brackets/BKT, mudflaps/MFP, spare-part kits/SPK, freight/FRGT, and any stone guard not yet mapped) is counted as 'Spare Parts'. Source: D-Flector Marine + Caravan product catalogs. To add a code, put its base (e.g. 'DSG038') under the right category.
